reasoning: Article 5 has only been invoked once in history (after 9/11). Without current search capabilities, the best piece of evidence is the Polymarket price of 0.04 as of mid-October 2025. Since the forecast date is late October with just over two months remaining in the year, and assuming no recent invocation has occurred (which would have spiked the price to ~0.99), the probability over the remaining two months is extremely low. A base rate of ~1/75 years gives an annualized risk of ~1.3%. Adjusting for higher modern geopolitical tensions and the market's 4% valuation, a 3% probability for the remainder of 2025 seems well-calibrated.
